basics.name: Daniel Rosehill
basics.label: AI & Technical Communications Specialist
basics.summary: AI developer and technical communications professional with over a decade of experience bridging AI systems, workflow orchestration, and strategic business communications. Expert in developing multi-agent systems, RAG architectures, and translating complex AI concepts into scalable business solutions across cybersecurity, cloud computing, and emerging technologies.

work.name: DSR Holdings
work.summary: Boutique consultancy specializing in AI automation, technical communications, and workflow orchestration
highlights: Create technical communications for AI-focused businesses and emerging technology companies
Design agent orchestration systems and workflow automation solutions using n8n and custom integrations
Implement prompt engineering solutions and RAG architectures to enhance AI-powered workflows
Consult across cybersecurity, threat intelligence, cloud computing, and IoT sectors
Drive content strategy and technical documentation for multiple clients

work.name: Sir Ronald Cohen
work.summary: Office of Sir Ronald Cohen — global pioneer in impact investing, venture capital, and social finance
highlights: Led strategic communications for impact investing thought leadership initiatives
Coordinated with the International Foundation for Valuing Impacts (IFVI) and the Global Steering Group for Impact Investment (GSG) on data visualization and analysis
Developed multi-platform content strategies for global stakeholder engagement
Managed media relationships and high-profile communications

work.name: Ayyeka

highlights: Authored technical white papers on low-energy communications networks and IoT infrastructure
Managed and maintained company's Confluence knowledge base
Developed product marketing materials and technical content for enterprise clients

work.name: Finn Partners

highlights: Developed media relations strategies for technology sector clients
